The equation of state of an ideal gas is

$$pV = nRT.$$

In this equation, the constant $n$ is the number of

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the image.

vibe_explanation: In the ideal gas law equation $pV = nRT$, the variable $n$ specifically represents the amount of substance in moles. If the equation used the Boltzmann constant $k_B$ instead of the universal gas constant $R$ (i.e., $pV = N k_B T$), then $N$ would represent the number of molecules/particles.
